user_story: As a Manager, I want to add a new KT task, so that knowledge transfer between a provider and receiver is formally tracked
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I click Add new KT task and enter the required details; Then a new KT task is created and appears in the list

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter KT tasks by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant workforce
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list shows only tasks for the chosen employee group

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter KT tasks by a period using From and To dates, so that I can review knowledge transfer within a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I open the calendar and set From and To dates and click Search; Then only KT tasks within that period are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter KT tasks by department, so that I can review knowledge transfer for a specific team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I select a department and click Search; Then the list shows only KT tasks for that department

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter KT tasks by status such as Assigned, Initiated, Reassigned, Received, Pre Closed or Withdrawn, so that I can track progress at each stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I select a status and click Search; Then only KT tasks in that status are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search and reset the KT task filters, so that I can quickly apply or clear my search criteria
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter values on the KT Tasks screen; When I click Search the results update and when I click Reset the filters are cleared

user_story: As a Manager, I want to view KT tasks in a list with Task, Provider, Receiver, Assigner, Project, Start date, Due date and Status columns, so that I can see all key details at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When results are returned; Then each KT task row displays its provider, receiver, assigner, project, start date, due date and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to refresh the KT tasks list, so that I always see the most up-to-date task information
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the KT Tasks screen; When I click Refresh; Then the KT task list reloads with current data
